description: An aerodynamics team has frozen the outer mold line of the eCRM-001 model and handed it off to the structural group. Open the master model at /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM-001_wing_tail.vsp3 in OpenVSP. Read the engineering specification at /home/ga/Desktop/structural_spec.txt to find the required internal structural layout for the main Wing. Using the 'Structure' (or Internal Structure) properties panel for the main Wing component, add a Front Spar at 22% chord (0.22) and a Rear Spar at 68% chord (0.68). Additionally, configure the wing to have exactly 34 ribs. Save the updated model to /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/eCRM001_structural.vsp3.
